choose_option: Please choose one of the options below:
game_will_start:
🎮 The game will start in 60 seconds! ⏳
👥 At least 4 players are required!
already_in_game: ⚠️ You are already in the game
shop_info: 🛍 In the shop you can buy role skins and special abilities
help_text: Mafia is a strategic role-playing game. Every night decisions are made, every day someone is judged.
error_register: ❌ You couldn't join. Please open the bot and press /start first.
not_enough_players: ❌ Not enough players! Need at least {min}. Current: {count}
game_ended_early: ❌ The game was cancelled — not enough players joined.
cannot_leave_running: ⚠️ You cannot leave a game in progress.
night_started: 🌙 Night {number} begins. Check your private messages for actions!
day_started: ☀️ Day {number}. Discuss who the Mafia might be! Voting starts in {seconds}s.
vote_started: 🗳 Voting begins! Choose who to lynch:
vote_revote: 🔄 It's a tie! One more round of voting:
no_lynch: ⚖️ No majority reached. No one is lynched today.
action_recorded: ✅ Action recorded. Waiting for other players...
action_already_done: ⚠️ You already submitted your action for this night.
night_result_saved: 🛡 Someone was saved by the Doctor tonight!
mafia_wins: 🔴 MAFIA WINS! The town has fallen.
town_wins: 🟢 TOWN WINS! All mafia members have been eliminated!
creator_only: 🚫 Only the group owner can start the game.
lang_select_prompt: 🌍 Tilni tanlang / Choose language / Выберите язык:
